ogTitle: Jindalee vs Jobs Gate: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jindalee and Jobs Gate.
heading: Jindalee vs Jobs Gate — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jindalee, Queensland and Jobs Gate, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jobs Gate has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Jindalee (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jindalee or Jobs Gate safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jindalee has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Jobs Gate scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jindalee scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Jobs Gate scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jindalee or Jobs Gate?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jobs Gate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
